titleStmt.title: SII 9.128: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 128. (A.R. No. 278 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE ISVARA TEMPLE AT GUDIHALLI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 987, Viśvāvasu, Pushya, śu. 7, Ādityavāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, Vyatīpāta. The date is irregular. In Viśvāvasu, Pushya śu. 7 fell on Wednesday = A.D. 1065, December 7 and the Uttarāyaṇa day fell on December 24, Saturday. The record refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Trailōkyamalladēva. It states that while Vishṇuvardhana-Mahārāja Vijayādityadēva was ruling over KadaM- baḷike thousand, and Ballakunde three-hundred his subordinate Bijjaḷadēva made, with the consent of the king when the prince had camped at Arasikeṟe on his way to the southern expedition, a gift of the village Kaḍakoḷa in the Murttage thirty sub-division in Kōgaḷi five-hundred for the service of the god, Noḷambēśvaradēva for feeding of the pious and for imparting education. The gift was made after washing the feet of Divyaśakti-Paṇḍitadēva of the Lākuḷa sect of the Śaivas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayaścābhyudayaśca . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicandracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūla
staṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . rakṣisuge virūpākṣanapēkṣeyanosedittu dharmma
namaḷaṁ svayaṁbhuvācaṁdrārkkaṁ . śrīsvayaṁbhuviropākṣadēvāya namaḥ
© svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama
bhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḻaka cāḻukyābharaṇa śrīmattraiḷōkyamalla
dēvara vijayarājyābhivriddhipravardhamānamācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ
saluttamire © svasti sarvvalōkāśraya samastabudhajanāśrayanā
havamallanaṁkakāṟaṁ paramaṇḍaḻasūṟekāṟa kaṭakaprākāra vandijanā
dhāra vairimadamarddana pratāpajanārddhananacaḷitavākyaṁ cāḻukyamāṇikya vī
raśrīkēḻīśadananabhinavamadana vipakṣakuḻakāḻadaṇḍa vīramārttaṇḍa ripu
rāyakumarahridayasella sāhasamalla dīnānāthacintāmaṇi maṇḍaḻikamakuṭacū
ḍāmaṇi veṁgimaṇḍaḷēśvaranayyanadaṇḍaṁ śrīviṣṇuvarddhanamahārājavijeyāditya
dēvaru śrīmadāhavamalladēvapādāṁbujārādhinastitanāguttumire
muraripumūrtiyāgi paramōtsavadindavatāramādanī dhareyane kāyalartthijanakī
yalkāraṇakarttuvāgiyuṁ dharegesedirdda bhūbhujana kṣatriyadharmmada rājyalīḷegārddo
re bhuvanatrayaṁgaḷoḷamintidu bijjaladēvabhūpanoḻu . dharmmajanaṁ vicārapa
ranaṁ sujanapriyanaṁ nripōttamaṁ nirmmaḻanaṁ dayāparanī bhūpasikhāmaṇi vi
ṣṇuvarddhanaṁ dharmmavicāradoḻu neṟeye bhāvisuvaṁ jagadēkadāniyoḷu karmmaśa
rīriyāda nriparārddore bijjaladēvabhūpanoḻu © Arimadagandhasindhu
raghaṭāḷige bijjaḷadēvaneṁba kēseriya nakhāgradarppahatakaṁ taḍe śatru
ghaṭāḷiyuṁ bhayaṁkarabharadiṁ paḍalvaḍadaṁtireyāhamallanaṁkakāṟanoḷa
risainyabhairavanūḷārddore bijbaladēvabhūpanoḷ © svasti samastabhuvanēsanāhavama
lladēvara dayeyiṁ vijayādityadēvarkkadaṁbaḷike sāsiramuṁ kōgaḷiyaynūṟuṁ ballakuṁde mūnūṟu(ṁ)
manāḻuttuṁ kṣatriyadharmmābhidhānadoḻu rājyaṁgeyyuttamire śrīmadāhavama
lladēvara besadiṁ dakṣiṇadiśāvarakke digvijiyaṁgeyyalendu yānōdyuktanāgi samastasāmagri
verasarasiyakeṟeyoḻu bīḍaṁ biṭṭu samastanijaparijanaṁ berasu mahāvaḍḍōlagaṁgoṭṭirdu dēvatāpra
saṁgamādudondu prasthāvadoḻarasaṁ noḷaṁbēśvaradēvara nō(r)ḻpatyāgrahadiṁ dēvatālayake vandu sarasvatī
maṁṭapamaṁ nōḍi lōkavikhyātamappa divyaśaktippaṇḍitadēvaratapōvidhānakkamantavargge śrīparvvatadagastēśvarada
santatimaṭhamilliya maṇḍaḷika tapōdhanaru niyamastaruṁ śadācārarappudumamintidu naiṣṭikasthānameṁ
budanaṟidu kritayugadādisaṁsiddhada bāṇāsurapratiṣṭhitamappa bāṇēśvaradēvaraṁ nōḍimidu divyasthā
nadiṁ suprasiddhamappudumanaṟidu noḷaṁbēśvaradēvarāsthānaraṁgada ramaṇīyateyaṁ nōḍimiṁtidu pūjyasthānamuṁ
tīrtthasthānameṁbudanarasananumānisidāyavasaradoḷu puṇnyabhāvaneyaṁ bhāvisuvuduṁ sakanripakāḷātīta
987 neya visvāvasusaṁvatsarada pauṣya suddha saptamiyādityavāramuttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁti vyatīpātadaṁdu
kṣatriyaguṇasaṁpannanuṁ vicāraparanuṁ yudhiṣṭhiravidhānōpāyanenisida bijjaladēvaṁ bhaktipūrvvakadiṁdara
siyakeṟeya noḷaṁbēśvaradēvargge dēvara sannidhānadoḷu dānasanmānādigaḷiṁ divyaśakti paṇḍitadēvara pādaprakṣāḷanaṁ
geydukōgaḷiyaynūṟaroḷagaṇa murttagemūvattaṟa kaṁpaṇada kaḍakoḷanaṁ sarvvabādhāpari
hāramāge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi noḷaṁbēśvaradēvaraṁgabhōga pūjepunaskāra snānanivēdya
kkamondu bhāgamilliya divyatapōdhanarāhāradānakkamondu bhāga vidyādānakkamo
ndu bhāgamappaṁtāgi traiḷōkyamalladēvara besade bijjaladēvaṁ candhrārkasthāyivarami
ntīdharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisuvudu . Intīdharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavargge vāraṇāsikuru
kṣētradoḷasvamēdhakanyādānaṁ tuḷāpuruṣamiḻdu sahaśra kapileyuṁ dānaṁgo
ṭṭa phaḷamakkumintī dharmmamanaḷidavaṁgī tīrtthasthānadoḷu tapōdhanarumaṁ vēdapāragarappa brā
hmaṇarumaṁ kapileyumanaḷida mahāpātakamakku . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmma
sētuṁ nripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ Ētāni ṣaḍbhāginaḻpārthivēndrō bhūyō
bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harētu vasundhara saṣṭirvva
riṣasahaśrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . dakṣiṇadisāvarakkideyakṣaya
guṇadiṁde naiṣṭikasthānaṁ pāpakṣayakke hētuvenisidudī kṣētradamahime negaḷda
bhuvanāṁtaradoḷ .
śrīparamana padakamaḷamanēpottuṁ smaraṇemārppa pūjipa bageyiṁ vyāpakanoḍagūḍuva niṣṭā
parateya divyaśaktipaṇḍitadēvaru © varahritupadmadoḷudiyipa paramananatyāntasūkṣmanaṁ vyā
pakanaṁ sthirabhāvaneyiṁ yōgadoḷiradeydida vāmaśaktipaṇḍitadēvaru © lākuḷadēvāgamadī lō
kajanastutyamāge niṣṭāparariṁtēkībhāvadinaccanoḷēkārttha vāmaśaktipaṇḍitadēvaru ©
Digital edition of SII 9.128 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
